section.div: 多播放源自动采集在线影视网站 golang vue
A modern and elegant dashboard for network traffic visualization and analysis.

Video & Audio downloader for Android with web browser and player. M3U8 and MPD supported, live stream supported, using youtube-dlp and custom mp4/mp3/m3u8/mpd downloader, cookies supported, HTTP & SOCKS proxy chains supported, encrypted DNS, Adblocker with lists managenment
🎧 Open source music streaming app! Available for both desktop & mobile!
本插件可以用于CSDN/知乎/脚本之家/博客园/掘金等网站,一键下载文章html或markdown文件;实现无需登录一键复制代码;支持选中代码;或者代码右上角按钮的一键复制;解除关注博主即可阅读全文提示;去除登录弹窗;去除跳转APP弹窗.
